notes: Starter state: units begin at max HP from rulesets/territory-v1/units.json.
E003 locked starter: max-HP starter board copied from territory-v1 with ruleset id changed to territory-v1-locked.
turn-001: P1 opened with near-side center captures and kept the guardian/marksman pair pointed toward the middle.
turn-002: P2 committed both scouts south and west, starting the flank without exposing the support units.
turn-003: P1 upgraded the lead guardian and pushed the center column while recruiting a second marksman.
turn-004: P2 flipped the southern center and added a raider to make the flank punish more than a capture race.
turn-005: P1 took center-north and tightened the guardian/marksman line around the middle.
turn-006: P2 completed the southeast capture and chipped P1’s raider from the southern screen.
turn-007: P1 collapsed onto the forward scout and removed it while adding a second guardian.
turn-008: P2 kept the remaining scout wide and built a healer behind the southern support pocket.
turn-009: P1 claimed the exact middle and shifted the second guardian toward the east response lane.
turn-010: P2 flipped the east center and punished both exposed center units.
turn-011: P1 killed the flanking scout, then recruited another marksman to rebuild the center screen.
turn-012: P2 killed P1’s center scout and sent a fresh scout toward the west-south recapture.
turn-013: P1 converted the upgraded guardian into a kill on P2’s support marksman and added another guardian.
